i=s(26869),o=s(98273),a=s(6458);function n(e){let t=arguments.length>1&&void 0!==arguments[1]?arguments[1]:{},{search:s}=(0,o.zy)(),n=(0,a.P_)(e),r=t.disableAutoLang?"":(0,i.parse)(s).lang??"";if("string"==typeof e){let{url:s,query:o}=(0,i.parseUrl)(e);return n?s:(0,i.stringifyUrl)({url:s,query:{lang:r,...o}},{skipEmptyString:!0,...t})}let{pathname:l="",search:c={},hash:d}=e,u=d?`#${d}`:"";return n?l:`${(0,i.stringifyUrl)({url:l,query:{lang:r,...c}},{skipEmptyString:!0,...t})}${u}`}},6458:function(e,t,s){s.d(t,{FR:()=>l,P_:()=>r});var i=s(26869),o=s(32049),a=s(20261),n=s(78253);function r(e){let t=!1;if(!(0,o.fU)())return!1;try{var s,r,l;let{seoAbtest:o,isSearchEngineBot:c,featureFlags:d}=(0,a.w)();if(!c)return!1;let u=("string"==typeof e?null==(s=(0,i.parseUrl)(e))?void e}}(p),S=(null==v||null==(r=v.kep_canonical_abtest)?void 0:r.vid)??"v0",C=(null==v||null==(l=v.video_canonical_abtest)?void l(e){let{to:t,location:{search:s}={search:""}}=e,o=arguments.length>1&&void 0!==arguments[1]?arguments[1]:{},a=(0,i.parse)(s).lang??"",n=r(t);if("string"==typeof
